title: DevOps / Cloud Engineer
description: Master infrastructure, deployment, and cloud computing. From Linux basics to Kubernetes orchestration, build and maintain scalable, reliable systems.

nodes.title: Linux Fundamentals
nodes.description: File system, permissions, processes, package management, shell scripting, and SSH.

nodes.title: Networking Fundamentals
nodes.description: TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP/HTTPS, load balancing, firewalls, VPNs, and CDN concepts.

nodes.title: Shell Scripting (Bash)
nodes.description: Write automation scripts, cron jobs, and system administration scripts with Bash.

nodes.title: Git & GitHub
nodes.description: Advanced Git — rebasing, cherry-picking, bisect, worktrees, and Git hooks.

nodes.title: Python for DevOps
nodes.description: Python scripting for automation, API interactions, infrastructure management, and tooling.

nodes.title: Infrastructure as Code (Terraform)
nodes.description: Define infrastructure declaratively with Terraform — providers, modules, state management, and HCL syntax.

nodes.title: Docker
nodes.description: Containerization — Dockerfile, images, containers, volumes, networking, and Docker Compose.

nodes.title: Kubernetes
nodes.description: Container orchestration — pods, services, deployments, configmaps, secrets, and scaling.

nodes.title: Helm & K8s Package Management
nodes.description: Package and deploy applications on Kubernetes with Helm charts and Kustomize.

nodes.title: CI/CD Pipelines
nodes.description: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins, or CircleCI for automated build, test, and deploy workflows.

nodes.title: Monitoring & Logging
nodes.description: Prometheus, Grafana, ELK stack, Loki, and alerting for observability.

nodes.title: AWS Core Services
nodes.description: EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, CloudFormation, IAM, VPC, and CloudFront.

nodes.title: Google Cloud Platform
nodes.description: GCP fundamentals — Compute Engine, Cloud Storage, BigQuery, Cloud Functions, and GKE.

nodes.title: Microsoft Azure
nodes.description: Azure fundamentals — VMs, Blob Storage, Azure Functions, AKS, and Azure DevOps.

nodes.title: DevSecOps
nodes.description: Security scanning, secret management (Vault), container security, SAST/DAST, and compliance.

nodes.title: Linux Security & Hardening
nodes.description: SELinux, AppArmor, firewall (iptables/ufw), SSH hardening, and system security best practices.

nodes.title: Backup & Disaster Recovery
nodes.description: Backup strategies, RTO/RPO, disaster recovery planning, and infrastructure resilience.

nodes.title: Ansible / Configuration Management
nodes.description: Automate server configuration, deployment, and infrastructure management with Ansible playbooks.

nodes.title: Web Servers (Nginx/Apache)
nodes.description: Configure Nginx or Apache as reverse proxy, load balancer, and static file server.

nodes.title: Linux Performance
nodes.description: Performance profiling — top, htop, strace, perf, sysstat, and kernel tuning.

nodes.title: Certifications
nodes.description: AWS Solutions Architect, CKA (Kubernetes), Azure Fundamentals, or HashiCorp Terraform Associate.

nodes.title: Serverless Computing
nodes.description: AWS Lambda, Google Cloud Functions, or Azure Functions — event-driven, pay-per-use compute.

nodes.title: GitOps
nodes.description: ArgoCD, Flux — declarative deployments driven by Git, continuous reconciliation, and progressive delivery.
